vision.title: OUR VISION
vision.desc2: is accessible to all, combining gamified learning with real rewards to make upskilling effortless and exciting.
vision.desc3: is building a sustainable, global ecosystem where anyone can learn AI easily, earn crypto tokens, and grow together through the power of Web3 and blockchain-driven innovation.

mission.title: OUR MISSION
mission.desc: Our mission is to empower over 1 million learners worldwide by making AI education simple, accessible, and rewarding through gamified learning experiences and blockchain-powered incentives.

section3.title: Our Roadmap
section3.subtitle: See the milestones that brought us here, and get a sneak peak of what’s next.
section3.request: Have some feature request? Join our Telegram and tell us more!

details.v011: Idea To Reach I Million Valuation

m1.title: The First Wave of Early Adopters and Premium Learners
m1.desc: Successfully onboarded over 2,000 active community members, with 30 paid learners joining our exclusive AI Genesis Plan. This marks the beginning of our mission to deliver accessible, gamified AI education and real-world crypto rewards through a thriving Web3 ecosystem.

m2.title: Official Launch - Gamified Learning Goes Live
m2.desc: Activated the full Skilleareum platform, introducing interactive AI modules that transform traditional learning into a reward-driven experience, setting the stage for seamless Web3-powered upskilling.

m3.title: Industry Recognition - Pioneering Web3 AI Education
m3.desc: Established Skilleareum as a recognized leader in gamified AI learning, delivering a unique blend of education, blockchain innovation, and real-time earning opportunities for a global user base.

m4.title: Expansion Through Powerful Partnerships
m4.desc: Secured collaborations with 4 thriving communities, broadening our impact to reach to new audiences of AI learners and innovators fostering new channels for learners to connect, collaborate, and grow within the Skilleareum ecosystem.
